protocol.name: CCBS-12 — Cross-Collateral Basis Snapback
protocol.claim: An unusually wide same-maturity price wedge between Binance USD-M and COIN-M BTC current-quarter futures mean-reverts within twelve hours strongly enough for an equal-initial-USD-face two-leg spread to survive exact costs.

evidence_boundary.2023_label: development; outcome-blind only, not feature-pristine OOS

source_contract.manifest_content_hash_algorithm: SHA-256 of canonical JSON body after excluding manifest_hash and created_at
source_contract.panel: BTCUSDT and BTCUSD CURRENT_QUARTER continuous-contract 5m OHLC from official Binance public market data
source_contract.clean_row: source_complete and both OHLC-valid flags true; no fill, nearest join, or cross-segment carry

economic_object.maturity_match: both legs share the panel delivery_time and contract_segment
economic_object.funding_cashflow: none; both instruments are delivery futures
economic_object.structural_orthogonality_hypothesis: relative value between collateral conventions with opposite initial derivative legs; no explicit BTC-direction, perpetual funding/premium, OI, Kimchi/FX, REX, Markov, tree, or LLM gate

feature_formula.segmentation: all rolling state resets at each contract_segment
feature_formula.prior: p_t = w_t shifted by one row within contract_segment

support_only_selection.candidate: clean state onset where abs(z)>=threshold and abs(w-center)>=20bp; a direct z-sign reversal is a new onset
support_only_selection.reservation: after a kept candidate, reserve through entry+12h even if the eventual trade exits early; ignored onsets cannot create a delayed entry
support_only_selection.threshold_rule: select the largest grid value passing every support floor

signal_and_execution_clock.signal_bar: completed 5m bar with open time t
signal_and_execution_clock.entry: t+10m open; one full 5m execution-delay bar after availability
signal_and_execution_clock.normalization_exit_trigger: first completed held bar with abs(z)<=0.5
signal_and_execution_clock.normalization_exit: trigger bar open time +10m; one full 5m execution-delay bar after availability
signal_and_execution_clock.exit_priority: earlier valid normalization exit, otherwise hard exit
signal_and_execution_clock.roll_rule: entry and every possible exit must be strictly before delivery_time
signal_and_execution_clock.overlap: one active spread; full reserved clock forbids re-entry

derivative_ledger.entry_sequence: read pre-entry equity E, freeze target face F=0.5*E for each leg, freeze quantities from entry opens, then deduct entry fees; entry fees do not resize
derivative_ledger.initial_sizing: fixed USD face F=0.5*pre-entry equity per leg
derivative_ledger.cm_usd_derivative_pnl: cm_coin_pnl * the same contemporaneous cm_mark used inside the inverse formula; high uses high, low uses low, exit uses exit open
derivative_ledger.fees: charged on each leg at entry and exit from portfolio equity; stress ledger replaces base_rate with 10bp; no maker rebate
derivative_ledger.exit_sequence: mark both derivative legs at the exit open, realize gross PnL, deduct both exit fees, then use resulting equity for the next accepted trade

strict_risk_contract.hwm: global/pre-entry high-water mark across the full declared wall clock
strict_risk_contract.held_bar_order: mark the favorable two-leg OHLC combination before the adverse combination; cross-venue extrema are combined adversarially even if not simultaneous
strict_risk_contract.hypothetical_liquidation_cost: deduct both-leg exit costs at every adverse mark
strict_risk_contract.hypothetical_um_liquidation_cost: rate * abs(frozen um quantity) * adverse um mark
strict_risk_contract.hypothetical_cm_liquidation_cost: rate * abs(frozen cm contract quantity) * 100 USD
strict_risk_contract.missing_held_path: fail the evaluation as a source-integrity error; never delete or shorten an accepted trade using future data availability
strict_risk_contract.cagr: full wall-clock, including warm-up, idle, and reserved periods

collateral_accounting_boundary.research_ledger_includes: derivative PnL of both legs in USD terms
collateral_accounting_boundary.research_ledger_omits: mark-to-market of BTC collateral posted for the inverse COIN-M leg, margin interest, transfers, liquidation-engine interactions, and executable integer contract/quantity rounding
collateral_accounting_boundary.consequence: historical CCBS is not evidence of account-level BTC neutrality and cannot be promoted directly to live trading
collateral_accounting_boundary.live_promotion_blocker: implement and verify an exact BTC-collateral ledger plus either a causal collateral hedge or documented unified-margin treatment

frozen_policy.threshold: selected once by the support-only largest-passing rule

development_2023_gate.base_cost_trade_net_return: realized two-leg derivative PnL minus entry and exit fees, divided by pre-entry equity
development_2023_gate.absolute_return: compound all base-cost trade net returns on the full declared calendar
development_2023_gate.half_and_branch_returns: compound base-cost net trade returns by entry half or entry z-sign; an empty bucket fails rather than passing at zero
development_2023_gate.gross_profit: sum realized two-leg derivative PnL before all fees
development_2023_gate.transaction_cost: sum all base-cost entry and exit fees on both legs
development_2023_gate.monthly_cluster_signflip: sum base-cost trade net returns by UTC entry month, exclude zero-trade months, enumerate all 2^m sign assignments to the m active monthly sums, and set one-sided p=count(permuted total>=observed total)/2^m

post_2023_sequence.terminal_failure: write a rejection artifact for the failed year, mark CCBS12 rejected, and do not open or fetch any later historical year for this family
post_2023_sequence.all_historical_passes_disposition: research candidate only; do not promote until the collateral ledger and forward-shadow requirements pass

orthogonality_gate.anchor_clock_construction: reconstruct only the three configured sleeve signal positions on the frozen 5m market grid; entry is signal_pos+1; retain only [year-Jan-01, next-Jan-01) UTC timestamps; record artifact SHA-256 and every input SHA-256
orthogonality_gate.anchor_clock_sequence: build the 2023 clock for the development gate; build each 2024+ year clock only when that year's source is sequentially authorized to open
orthogonality_gate.exact_5m_entry_overlap_share: CCBS entries exactly equal to any anchor entry divided by all CCBS entries
orthogonality_gate.entry_day_jaccard: intersection over union of UTC entry-date sets
orthogonality_gate.entry_overlap_scope: apply exact-time overlap and day Jaccard separately inside every evaluated development or OOS calendar year

btc_return_source.formula: UTC-day final BTCUSDT close divided by prior UTC-day final close minus one

orthogonality_gate.anchor_daily_pnl_construction: base-cost corrected-strict live-anchor replay at frozen weights; compound 5m portfolio returns inside each UTC day and record artifact/input hashes
orthogonality_gate.daily_alignment: each evaluated calendar year [Jan-01, next Jan-01), all UTC days included, CCBS and anchor no-trade days zero-filled; BTC beta is cov(CCBS daily PnL, BTC daily return)/var(BTC daily return)

marginal_portfolio_improvement.comparison: frozen live anchor versus live anchor plus 0.25*CCBS
marginal_portfolio_improvement.accounting: same full-calendar favorable-before-adverse portfolio ledger and base costs

diagnostics_not_repair_candidates: choose a z threshold using PnL
add REX, OI, funding, Kimchi/FX, Markov, tree, LLM, or regime gate
protocol.stop_rule: Reject before opening 2024 if the pre-2023 support-only rule finds no threshold or CCBS12 fails the frozen 2023 development gate. At any later annual failure, write the terminal rejection artifact and do not open a subsequent year. Do not repair sign, lookback, threshold, floor, exit, cost, branch, sizing, or add a directional gate after outcomes open. A historical pass remains research-only until the collateral-accounting blocker is closed.
